revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-135

A servo mechanism usually employing a d.c. split field motor and tacho-generator on the same shaft, in which it is intended that the speed of rotation be maintained proportional to an input voltage. The total number of revolutions of the output shaft is an approximate measure of the time-integral of the input voltage.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Velodyne integrator}}
